# MySQL Module (Chinese Source)

> English llms.txt for files under `docs/zh/mysql`.

## Docs

- [Module Overview](./index.mdx): Entry page for the MySQL knowledge map, learning paths, and level-based navigation.
- [Sidebar Metadata](./_meta.json): Navigation metadata for the MySQL module.
- [Schema Topic Overview](./schema.mdx): Root-level topic entry for schema design with beginner, intermediate, and advanced reading paths.
- [Transactions Topic Overview](./transactions.mdx): Root-level topic entry for transaction boundaries, locking, and deadlock diagnosis.
- [Performance Topic Overview](./performance.mdx): Root-level topic entry for slow SQL triage, execution plans, and optimization workflow.
- [Operations Topic Overview](./operations.mdx): Root-level topic entry for release checks, observability, backup, and incident handling.
- [Schema Submodule Index](./schema/llms.txt): English index for schema design and data modeling docs.
- [Transactions Submodule Index](./transactions/llms.txt): English index for transaction and lock docs.
- [Performance Submodule Index](./performance/llms.txt): English index for performance analysis and SQL tuning docs.
- [Operations Submodule Index](./operations/llms.txt): English index for release, observability, and incident docs.
- [This LLMs File](./llms.txt): Machine-readable index for this MySQL directory.

## Schema

- [Schema Design Principles](./schema/design-principles.mdx): Data modeling trade-offs, constraints, evolution rules, and production review checklist.

## Transactions

- [Locking Mechanisms](./transactions/locking-mechanisms.mdx): Isolation choices, lock behavior, deadlock analysis, and mitigation strategies.

## Performance

- [Tuning Playbook](./performance/tuning-playbook.mdx): Execution plan analysis, index strategy, query rewriting, and validation loop.

## Operations

- [Operations Runbook](./operations/runbook.mdx): Pre-release checks, runtime metrics, backup recovery, and post-incident review practices.
